def: A bathroom fixture, or the room containing it, for relieving yourself.
Money paid regularly to live in a home you don't own.
To clean something with water, usually with soap.
Containing nothing; not filled with anything.
Free of dirt or stains.
Having little or no light.
Not closed; allowing entry or access.
Feeling unhappy, often because of a loss or disappointment.
Holding your attention or curiosity; not boring.
A place where books are kept for reading or borrowing.
A shop that sells medicine.
Time away from work for rest or travel.
A large boat that travels across water.
A group of words that forms a complete statement.
A device used for talking with someone far away.
A printed publication with daily or weekly news.
The worldwide network connecting computers to share information.
A thought or plan about what to do.
A large natural stream of water flowing to the sea.
The space above the earth where clouds and the sun appear.
Used to express regret about a fact or situation.
A small, sweet red fruit with seeds on its skin.
A long orange root vegetable.
Seasoned ground meat packed into a casing.
A sweet spread made by cooking fruit with sugar.
A drink made from squeezed oranges.
A written list of items you need to buy.
Describes food or a diet that has no meat or fish.
A soft, warm pullover top, often made of cotton.
A soft piece of clothing worn on the foot, under a shoe.
A shaped covering worn on the head.
A pale brownish-tan color.
Material made from treated animal skin.
Soft hair from sheep, spun into yarn for clothing.
